notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Brice Turang reaches on a fielder's choice, fielded by second baseman Ozzie Albies. Jackson Chourio to 2nd. Jackson Chourio advances to 2nd, on a fielding error by second baseman Ozzie Albies.

notableEvents.label: Dominic Smith pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Dominic Smith grounds out, pitcher Abner Uribe to first baseman Jake Bauers.

notableEvents.label: Ozzie Albies walk-off
notableEvents.detail: Ozzie Albies homers (12) on a fly ball to right field. Matt Olson scores.

notableEvents.label: Gary Sánchez GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Gary Sánchez grounds into a double play, shortstop Jorge Mateo to second baseman Ozzie Albies to first baseman Matt Olson. William Contreras out at 2nd. Gary Sánchez out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Jake Bauers pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Jake Bauers strikes out on a foul tip.

notableEvents.label: Jake Bauers pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Jake Bauers called out on strikes.

notableEvents.label: Walk-off loss
notableEvents.detail: Ozzie Albies homers (12) on a fly ball to right field. Matt Olson scores.
